description: Persona registry extracted from BulletTrain_personas_rbac_config_70plus_v2.xlsx — 68 clinical, operational, and IAM personas across UK, USA, and Kenya contexts

data_sensitivity_tiers.High: Clinical notes, diagnoses, medications, sensitive results

personas.name: Consultant Physician
personas.role_description: Senior doctor responsible for diagnosis and treatment plans.

compliance.segregation_of_duties: No admin role; separate from audit-only staff
compliance.uk_nhs_nrbac_notes: Map intent to NRBAC clinical practitioner patterns

personas.name: GP (General Practitioner)
personas.role_description: Primary care clinician providing ongoing care and referrals.

compliance.uk_nhs_nrbac_notes: Primary care NRBAC mapping; activities for demographics/consultation

personas.name: Ward Nurse
personas.role_description: Registered nurse providing bedside care and observations.

compliance.uk_nhs_nrbac_notes: Nursing roles in NRBAC are distinct from prescribers

personas.name: Triage Nurse
personas.role_description: Performs initial assessment and triage categorisation.

compliance.uk_nhs_nrbac_notes: ED triage activities mapped to NRBAC triage-related roles

personas.name: Radiologist
personas.role_description: Interprets imaging studies and reports findings.

compliance.uk_nhs_nrbac_notes: Imaging roles in NRBAC; separate from admin

personas.name: Biomedical Scientist (Lab)
personas.role_description: Processes lab specimens and releases results.

compliance.uk_nhs_nrbac_notes: Lab roles distinct from clinicians; activity codes for results

personas.name: Pharmacist
personas.role_description: Dispenses medication and performs clinical checks.

compliance.uk_nhs_nrbac_notes: Pharmacy roles have specific NRBAC patterns

personas.name: Physiotherapist
personas.role_description: Provides rehabilitation assessment and treatment.

compliance.uk_nhs_nrbac_notes: Allied health roles map to specific NRBAC job roles

personas.name: Midwife
personas.role_description: Provides antenatal, intrapartum, and postnatal care.

compliance.uk_nhs_nrbac_notes: Maternity NRBAC mappings exist; add local codes
compliance.config_notes: Use high sensitivity due to maternity data

personas.name: Health Records Officer
personas.role_description: Manages medical records, filing, release, and indexing.

compliance.uk_nhs_nrbac_notes: Align with NRBAC records/admin roles

personas.name: Receptionist / Registrar
personas.role_description: Registers patients and manages appointments.

compliance.uk_nhs_nrbac_notes: Map to NRBAC demographic admin/receptionist activities

personas.name: NHS Registration Authority (RA) Agent
personas.role_description: Manages smartcard identities and role assignments.

compliance.uk_nhs_nrbac_notes: Directly relevant to NRBAC positioning
compliance.config_notes: Separate IAM admin scopes from clinical

personas.name: Caldicott Guardian / Privacy Officer
personas.role_description: Senior person responsible for patient information governance.

compliance.segregation_of_duties: No role granting; separate from RA agent
compliance.uk_nhs_nrbac_notes: Use NRBAC privacy roles/alerts where applicable

personas.name: Attending Physician
personas.role_description: Lead physician for inpatient care.

compliance.regulatory_constraints: HIPAA Privacy Rule; HIPAA Security Rule
compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Minimum necessary by duty and patient relationship
compliance.config_notes: Separate prescribing vs documentation scopes where possible

personas.name: Resident Physician
personas.role_description: Physician in training with supervised privileges.

compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Constrain to minimum necessary; require attestation

personas.name: Registered Nurse
personas.role_description: Provides nursing care and documentation.

compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Minimum necessary: no psychotherapy notes

personas.name: Nurse Practitioner / PA
personas.role_description: Advanced practice clinician with prescribing privileges.

compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Minimum necessary: role-based access by clinic

personas.name: Pharmacist
personas.role_description: Dispenses and reconciles medications.

compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Apply minimum necessary; segregate narcotics workflows

personas.name: Medical Laboratory Scientist
personas.role_description: Performs lab testing and releases results.

compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Restrict to lab workflows per minimum necessary

personas.name: Radiology Technologist
personas.role_description: Performs imaging procedures and uploads studies.

compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Minimum necessary; restrict viewing full chart

personas.name: Care Coordinator
personas.role_description: Coordinates referrals and transitions of care.

compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Minimum necessary; limit to assigned panel

personas.name: Billing / Claims Specialist
personas.role_description: Creates claims and manages billing data.

compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Minimum necessary: avoid clinical details beyond billing

personas.name: Health Information Management (HIM) Release of Information
personas.role_description: Manages ROI, record corrections, and document handling.

compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Minimum necessary; track disclosures

personas.name: Privacy Officer / Compliance
personas.role_description: Investigates incidents and oversees privacy compliance.

compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Strongly tied to HIPAA audit controls

personas.name: Security Administrator (Health IT)
personas.role_description: Manages IAM, access policies, and security monitoring.

compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Ensure least privilege and PAM

personas.name: Medical Officer
personas.role_description: Doctor providing diagnosis and treatment in facility care.

compliance.regulatory_constraints: Kenya Health Act 2017; Kenya Data Protection Act

personas.name: Clinical Officer
personas.role_description: Mid-level clinician providing primary care.

compliance.regulatory_constraints: Kenya Health Act 2017; Kenya Data Protection Act

personas.name: Nursing Officer
personas.role_description: Registered nurse responsible for inpatient nursing care.

compliance.regulatory_constraints: Kenya Health Act 2017; Kenya Data Protection Act

personas.name: Midwife
personas.role_description: Provides maternity and newborn care.

compliance.regulatory_constraints: Kenya Health Act 2017; Kenya Data Protection Act
compliance.kenya_notes: Maternity data treated as high sensitivity

personas.name: Pharmacist
personas.role_description: Dispenses medication and manages inventory.

compliance.regulatory_constraints: Kenya Health Act 2017; Kenya Data Protection Act

personas.name: Lab Technologist
personas.role_description: Runs tests and enters results into LIS/EMR.

compliance.regulatory_constraints: Kenya Health Act 2017; Kenya Data Protection Act
compliance.kenya_notes: Align to KenyaEMR-style lab roles (where used)

personas.name: Radiographer
personas.role_description: Performs imaging procedures and manages study capture.

compliance.regulatory_constraints: Kenya Health Act 2017; Kenya Data Protection Act
compliance.kenya_notes: Resource-constrained settings: offline workflows may exist

personas.name: Health Records & Information Officer (HRIO)
personas.role_description: Registers patients, manages records, filing and retrieval.

compliance.regulatory_constraints: Kenya Health Act 2017; Kenya Data Protection Act
compliance.kenya_notes: Recognised health records cadre in Kenya

personas.name: Facility Data Clerk (HMIS)
personas.role_description: Captures aggregate indicators and submits to national systems.

compliance.regulatory_constraints: Kenya Data Protection Act; MoH reporting policies
compliance.segregation_of_duties: No patient-level clinical access by default

personas.name: County Health Management Team (CHMT) Analyst
personas.role_description: Analyses county data and performance indicators.

compliance.kenya_notes: Role is not clinical; avoid PHI

personas.name: Community Health Promoter / CHW
personas.role_description: Provides community follow-up and basic data capture.

compliance.regulatory_constraints: Kenya Health Act 2017; Kenya Data Protection Act

personas.name: Emergency Physician
personas.role_description: ED doctor providing urgent assessment and treatment.

compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Minimum necessary; emergency exceptions still audited

personas.name: Paramedic (Pre-hospital)
personas.role_description: Pre-hospital clinician capturing observations and handover.

compliance.segregation_of_duties: No access to longitudinal record beyond need
compliance.uk_nhs_nrbac_notes: Map to ambulance job roles; local NRBAC where used

personas.name: Dietitian
personas.role_description: Provides nutrition assessment and plan.

compliance.uk_nhs_nrbac_notes: Allied health NRBAC mapping

personas.name: Speech & Language Therapist
personas.role_description: Assesses speech and swallowing and documents care.

compliance.uk_nhs_nrbac_notes: NHS allied health mapping

personas.name: Mental Health Clinician
personas.role_description: Provides mental health assessment and treatment.

compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Minimum necessary with heightened sensitivity
compliance.config_notes: Set sensitivity high; consider break-glass constraints

personas.name: Social Worker
personas.role_description: Supports discharge planning and social needs assessment.

compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Minimum necessary; limit to assigned patients

personas.name: Case Manager
personas.role_description: Coordinates care and utilisation review.

compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Minimum necessary; avoid clinical notes write

personas.name: Operating Theatre Scheduler
personas.role_description: Manages theatre schedules and resource allocation.

compliance.uk_nhs_nrbac_notes: NRBAC: admin/scheduling activity codes

personas.name: Bed Manager
personas.role_description: Manages bed allocation and patient flow.

compliance.uk_nhs_nrbac_notes: NRBAC operations roles

personas.name: Theatre Scrub Nurse
personas.role_description: Assists in surgical procedures and documents perioperative care.

compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Minimum necessary within OR context

personas.name: Infection Prevention Nurse
personas.role_description: Monitors infections and reports to public health as needed.

compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Minimum necessary; public health disclosures permitted but controlled

personas.name: Telehealth Clinician
personas.role_description: Provides remote consultations via telehealth.

compliance.uk_nhs_nrbac_notes: NRBAC telehealth roles may be local

personas.name: Home Care Nurse
personas.role_description: Provides home visits and records observations remotely.

compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Minimum necessary; limit to assigned patients

personas.name: Clinical Documentation Improvement (CDI) Specialist
personas.role_description: Improves clinical documentation for coding and quality.

compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Minimum necessary; restrict to assigned charts

personas.name: Clinical Coder
personas.role_description: Codes encounters and diagnoses for claims.

compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Minimum necessary; no psychotherapy notes

personas.name: Research Coordinator
personas.role_description: Coordinates clinical research with governance controls.

compliance.segregation_of_duties: Separate from clinical care unless dual-role approved
compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Minimum necessary; limit to consented subjects
compliance.config_notes: Use consent gating + purpose of use 'Research'

personas.name: Consent Officer
personas.role_description: Manages and validates consent directives and withdrawals.

compliance.uk_nhs_nrbac_notes: NRBAC governance roles may exist locally

personas.name: Data Quality Auditor
personas.role_description: Reviews data quality, completeness, and anomalies.

personas.name: Facility Administrator (Operations)
personas.role_description: Manages non-clinical operations and user access requests.

compliance.segregation_of_duties: No direct role provisioning (handled by IAM admin)

personas.name: Integration Engine Operator
personas.role_description: Monitors interface queues, retries, and routing for HL7/FHIR.

personas.name: Clinical Systems Support Analyst
personas.role_description: Supports clinical applications; troubleshoots access and workflows.

compliance.uk_nhs_nrbac_notes: NRBAC support roles exist in some contexts

personas.name: Chief Medical Officer (CMO)
personas.role_description: Clinical leadership with oversight and quality governance.

compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Minimum necessary; prefer de-identified analytics
compliance.config_notes: Keep PHI access limited to investigations

personas.name: Public Health Surveillance Officer
personas.role_description: Monitors surveillance data and outbreak indicators.

compliance.regulatory_constraints: Kenya Data Protection Act; MoH policies
compliance.kenya_notes: Focus on aggregate; request case-level only when authorised

personas.name: Occupational Therapist
personas.role_description: Supports patients to regain daily living skills.

compliance.uk_nhs_nrbac_notes: Allied health NRBAC mapping

personas.name: Respiratory Therapist
personas.role_description: Provides respiratory therapy and monitors ventilated patients.

compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Minimum necessary; ICU context constraints

personas.name: Dialysis Nurse
personas.role_description: Provides dialysis care and documents sessions.

personas.name: Clinic Manager
personas.role_description: Manages clinic operations and schedules; reports performance.

compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Minimum necessary; avoid chart access

personas.name: Clinical Psychologist
personas.role_description: Provides psychological assessment and therapy within hospital setting.

compliance.regulatory_constraints: HIPAA / GDPR / Kenya Data Protection Act
compliance.segregation_of_duties: No prescribing; no billing; no IAM provisioning
compliance.uk_nhs_nrbac_notes: NRBAC specialist clinician mapping (UK)
compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Psychotherapy notes segregated per HIPAA
compliance.config_notes: Separate FHIR MentalHealth profile + sensitivity tagging

personas.name: Psychiatrist
personas.role_description: Medical specialist in psychiatry with prescribing authority.

compliance.regulatory_constraints: HIPAA / GDPR / Kenya Data Protection Act
compliance.uk_nhs_nrbac_notes: NRBAC consultant mapping (UK)
compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Psychotherapy notes segregation applies

personas.name: Hospital Social Worker
personas.role_description: Supports discharge planning, safeguarding and social care coordination.

compliance.regulatory_constraints: HIPAA / GDPR / Kenya Data Protection Act
compliance.audit_expectation: Enhanced audit on sensitive social entries
compliance.segregation_of_duties: No medication write; no billing; no IAM rights
compliance.uk_nhs_nrbac_notes: NRBAC care coordination roles (UK)
compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Minimum necessary enforcement (US)
compliance.config_notes: Restrict to assigned caseload + sensitive field masking

personas.name: Safeguarding Lead
personas.role_description: Oversees safeguarding cases and protection protocols.

compliance.uk_nhs_nrbac_notes: Mapped to NHS safeguarding governance roles

personas.name: Mental Health Records Custodian
personas.role_description: Manages storage and disclosure of psychotherapy and sensitive notes.

compliance.segregation_of_duties: No prescribing; no clinical documentation editing
compliance.usa_hipaa_notes: Separate psychotherapy note classification mandatory
compliance.config_notes: Dedicated FHIR psychotherapy profile + sensitivity enforcement
